user_query: My company is organizing a team-building activity and we want to promote a healthy lifestyle. Find the nutritional information for healthy snacks and beverages. Also, calculate the body mass index (BMI) for each team member to encourage fitness. Additionally, suggest some team-building exercises to incorporate during the activity.

TaskList.description: Research and gather nutritional information for healthy snacks and beverages.
Collect height and weight data for each team member to calculate BMI.
Calculate the Body Mass Index (BMI) for each team member using the collected height and weight data.
Suggest team-building exercises that promote physical activities.
